metaTitle: Kegs & Casks For Sale Portland, OR | Beverage Equipment Traders
metaDescription: New and used kegs & casks shipping to Portland, Oregon. Half barrel kegs, sixth barrel kegs, cask kegs, and real ales containers. Multiple sizes in stock wi. Ships from San Marcos, CA. Rigging and installation available.
h1: Kegs & Casks For Sale — Portland, OR
heroBody: Beverage Equipment Traders ships new and used kegs & casks to Portland and nationwide from our 40,000 sq ft facility in San Marcos, CA. Every piece photographed, documented, and priced. Rigging and installation available at destination.
bodyHeading: Kegs & Casks Shipping to Portland — What to Know
locationParagraph: Freight to Portland from our San Marcos, CA facility typically runs 2 to 4 business days depending on equipment size and carrier routing. Rigging and installation at destination available on all purchases.
marketParagraph: Beverage Equipment Traders ships to all 50 states and serves buyers across North America. The Portland market is one of many active markets we work in — contact us regardless of your location and we will advise on current inventory and freight timing.
sidebarBody: Our trade desk responds within one business day. Provide your requirements and we will return current inventory and a freight quote to Portland.
inventoryHeading: Featured Kegs & Casks — Ships to Portland
faqHeading: Kegs & Casks Portland — Frequently Asked Questions
finalCtaBody: We ship from San Marcos, CA. Every piece photographed and condition-documented. Rigging and installation available in Portland and nationwide.
